content_en:
Prominent figures during his caliphate 1 al-Maqdisi, at-Tabiyeen fee Ans ab al-Qurashiyeen, 80-81. 2 al-Laythi, Tareekh Khaleefah ibn Khayyaf, quoted in Kurdi, al-Jjasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siytisi, 85. 3 al-Ba!adhuri, Ansab al-Ashraf, 5:214; an-Nuwayri, Nihayat al-Arab fee Funoon al-Adab,2:266. 4 al-Bukhari, at-Tareekh al-Kabeer, 4:50. 5 Quoted in Kurdi, al-/jasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi, 86. 6 Kurdi, al-/jasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi, 86. 7 Kurdi, al-Jjasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi, 86. 8 al-Mas'oodi, Murooj adh-Dhahab wa Mu 'adin al-Jawhar, 3:15; Kurdi, al-Jjasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi, 86. 9 Ibn al-' Arabi, Mul:zar;larat al-Abrar wa Masamarat al-Akhbiir, 1 :66; Kurdi, al-/jasan ibn 'Ali wa Dawruhu as-Siyasi, 87. 10 lbn al-Kazrooni, Mukhta$ar at-Tareekh, 80. 11 an-Nuwayri, Nihayat al-Arab, 5:223. 12 adh-Dhahabi, Sayr A 'lam an-Nubala ', 3:102.

Notes - Chapter 9 13 Ibn Atheer and al-Jazari, Asad al-Ghdbahfi Ma 'rifat a$-$ahiibah, 4:450. 14 lbn Katheer, al-Bidiiyah wan-Nihiiyah, 11 :354. 15 lbn I:Iajar al-' Asqalani, al-1$iibah fee Tamyeez a$-$a/:liibah, 5:360-361. 16 al-Kindi, Wuliit Mi(fr, 44; lbn Taghribardi, an-Nujoom az-Ziihirahfi Mulook Mi$r wal-Qiihirah, 1 :94. 17 Ibn Atheer and al-Jazari, Asad al-Ghiibah fi Ma 'rifat a(f-$ahiibah, 4:452. 18 lbn 'Abdul-Barr, al-ls ti 'iib fee Ma 'rifat al-A$-/:ziib, 3: 1290. 19 lbn Sa' d, at-Tabaqiit al-Kubrii at-Tabaqat al-Khiimisah min a(f-Sa/:liibah, 1:214; adh-Dhahabi, Sayr A 'liim an-Nubalii', 3:512. 20 lbn Sa' d, at-Tabaqiit al-Kubrii at-Tabaqat al-Khiimisah min a(f-$a/:liibah, 1 :212. 21 adh-Dhahabi, Sayr A 'liim an-Nubalii ', 3:513. 22 at-Tabari, Dhakhii 'ir al- 'Uqbii fee Maniiqib Dhawil-Qurbii, 394. 23 Ibn 'Asakir, Tiireekh Dimashq, 39:356. 24 al-Bukhari, at-Tiireekh a(f-$agheer lil-Bukhiiri, 73. 25 al-Fasawi, al-Ma 'rifat at-Tiireekh, 3:322. 26 adh-Dhahabi, Tiireekh al-lsliim lfawiidith Sanah 81-JOOAH, 147. 27 al-Laythi, Tiireekh Khaleefah ibn Khayyiif, 225. 28 adh-Dhahabi, Tiireekh al-lsliim lfawiidith Sanah 81-100 AH, 147. 29 adh-Dhahabi, Tiireekh al-lsliim lfawiidith Sanah 81-JOOAH, 147. 30 lbn Atheer and al-Jazari, Asad al-Ghiibahfi Ma 'rifat a(f-$ahiibah, 3:544. 31 adh-Dhahabi, Sayr A 'liim an-Nubalii ', 3 :456. 32 lbn I:Iajar al-' Asqalani, al-1$iibah fee Tamyeez a$-$a/:liibah, 4:36. 33 Ibn I:Iajar al-'Asqalani, al-1$iibahfee Tamyeez a(f-$a/:ziibah, 4:37. 34 Ibn Atheer and al-Jazari, Asad al-Ghiibah fi Ma 'rifat a(f-$ahiibah, 3: 199. 35 lbn Katheer, al-Bidiiyah wan-Nihiiyah, 12:300. 36 lbn Sa'd, af-Tabaqiit al-Kubrii, 2: 16; its chain is sound. 37 lbn I:Iajar al-'Asqalani, al-1$iibahfee Tamyeez a(f-$a/:ziibah, 4:37. 38 Ibn 'Abdul-Barr, al-ls ti 'iib fee Ma 'rifat al-A$-/:ziib, 3 :881. 39 lbn I:Iajar al-'Asqalani, al-1$iibahfee Tamyeez a$-$a/:ziibah, 4:37. 40 Ibn 'Asakir, Tiireekh Dimashq, 29:187. 41 at-Tadamri, Tiireekh al-Jsliim, lf awiidith wa Wafiyiit, 431. 42 at-Tadamri, Tiireekh al-Jsliim, lf awiidith wa Wafiyiit, 431. 43 lbn 'Asakir, Tiireekh Dimashq, 29:187. 44 lbn Sa' d, at-Tabaqiit al-Kubrii af-Tabaqat al-Khiimisah min a(f-$a/:ziibah, 2:25. 45 lbn 'Abdul-Barr, al-lsti'iibfee Ma'rifatal-A$-/:ziib, 3:881. Al-/fasan ibn 'Ali
content_id: Bagian ini memuat catatan kaki dan referensi untuk Bab Sembilan tentang tokoh-tokoh terkemuka pada masa kekhalifahan Al-Hasan (ra). Catatan mencakup sumber-sumber dari al-Maqdisi, at-Tabyin fi Ansab al-Qurasyiyyin; al-Laythi, Tarikh; serta biografi-biografi para sahabat terkemuka yang mendukung Al-Hasan seperti Qays ibn Sa'd, Ubaidullah ibn Abbas, dan Abdullah ibn Ja'far.
content_ar: الشخصيات البارزة في عهد خلافته. 1 المقدسي، التبيين في أنساب القرشيين، 80-81. 2 الليثي، تاريخ خليفة بن خياط، نقلاً عن كردي، الحسن بن علي ودوره السياسي. وقد عاصر الحسنُ بن علي رضي الله عنهما في فترة خلافته القصيرة جملةً من كبار الصحابة والتابعين، وكان لكل منهم مكانته ودوره في المجتمع الإسلامي. وقد حرص رضي الله عنه على الإفادة من آرائهم ومشورتهم في تصريف شؤون الدولة، وكان يُجلّ الصحابة الكبار ويأخذ برأيهم في المسائل الجليلة. وكانت مدة خلافته قصيرة لم تتجاوز بضعة أشهر قبل أن يتنازل عنها لمعاوية بن أبي سفيان حقناً لدماء المسلمين وإنهاءً للفتنة.
